description: Wallet V1 Crypto Compatibility Golden Vectors - Real ECDSA/secp256k1 Test Data

test_vectors.name: BIP39 Standard Test Vector 1
test_vectors.description: Standard BIP39 test vector with canonical Bitcoin-style address derivation
test_vectors.mnemonic: abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon about
notes: All clients MUST produce identical canonical string and signature

test_vectors.name: BIP39 Standard Test Vector 2 (Larger Transfer)
test_vectors.description: Alternative test vector with larger transaction amount for L2E token
test_vectors.mnemonic: letter advice cage absurd amount doctor acoustic avoid letter advice cage above
notes: Tests address derivation consistency across clients

signing_specification.signature_output: Hex string (lowercase or uppercase, variable length)
signing_specification.public_key_format: Uncompressed secp256k1 point (65 bytes total, 130 hex chars: 04 + 32-byte X + 32-byte Y)

address_derivation_specification.name: Bitcoin-style secp256k1 address derivation
address_derivation_specification.algorithm: SHA256 → RIPEMD160 → hex(0:40) → uppercase → prepend THR
steps: Input: Compressed secp256k1 public key (33 bytes, 66 hex chars including 02/03 prefix)
Step 2: Hash result with RIPEMD160 → 20 bytes
Step 3: Convert to hex → 40 hex characters
Step 4: Convert to UPPERCASE → 40 uppercase hex characters
Result format: THR + 40 hex chars (example: THR7D865DCC21E8B5D5D8B5B5D5D5D5D5D5)

validation.address_must_match: Signature public key must derive to transaction 'from' address

requirement_1.title: Canonical String Generation
requirement_1.description: All clients MUST generate identical canonical string for same transaction payload
requirement_1.test: Same mnemonic + same tx → same canonical string on wallet-app, mobile-sdk, chrome-extension

requirement_2.title: Address Derivation
requirement_2.description: All clients MUST derive same address from same mnemonic
requirement_2.test: Same mnemonic → same address on wallet-app, mobile-sdk, chrome-extension

requirement_3.title: ECDSA Signing
requirement_3.description: All clients MUST use ECDSA/secp256k1 (NOT HMAC-SHA256)
requirement_3.test: Signature verification passes with backend ECDSA verifier

requirement_4.title: Timestamp Format
requirement_4.description: All clients MUST use UNIX seconds (NOT milliseconds)

requirement_5.title: Secret Rejection
requirement_5.description: All clients MUST NOT transmit: secret, mnemonic, seed, privateKey, auth_secret, passphrase
requirement_5.test: Backend rejects transaction with forbidden fields with 400 error

backend_verification_checklist.public_key_matches: Public key in transaction matches signature ✅
backend_verification_checklist.address_matches: Address derived from public key matches 'from' field ✅
backend_verification_checklist.required_fields: All required fields present (from, to, amount, token, nonce, timestamp) ✅
backend_verification_checklist.forbidden_fields: No forbidden fields present (secret, mnemonic, seed, etc.) ✅
backend_verification_checklist.nonce_unique: Nonce not used before (if nonce tracking enabled) ✅
backend_verification_checklist.address_format_valid: Address is 43 chars, starts with THR, body is uppercase hex ✅
